title: Israeli Forces Fire Tear Gas Near Palestinian Schoolchildren in Masafer Yatta
detail: Israeli military personnel discharged tear gas toward a group of Palestinian children attempting to reach their school in Masafer Yatta, occupied West Bank. The incident occurred after Israeli authorities erected a fence blocking the students' usual route to their school. Al Jazeera documented the 58-second confrontation on video, adding to ongoing tensions in the occupied territories.

media.caption: Israeli forces fire tear gas near Palestinian schoolchildren in Masafer Yatta, West Bank
